name: Turmeric Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute dry rice in butter (4 tablespoons) until translucent. Do not burn! Add the celery, garlic, onion, and turmeric powder. Mix well in the pan. Cook for a couple of minutes, then turn off the heat.
2. Add the chicken broth, raisins, and nuts to the pan. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to simmer. Cover tightly and simmer for about 20 minutes. Let the rice cool down before fluffing with a fork.
3. In a small dish, beat the egg and mix with a fork. Add about 4 tablespoons melted butter along with the wine. Mix this into the rice.
Enjoy.
